mapper.sql: Id, Enterprise_No, Product_No, Sub_Code, Start_Date, End_Date, Contract_Url, Status_Code, Remark, Create_Date
mapper.insert:
insert into cooperation_period (Id, Enterprise_No, Product_No, Sub_Code, Start_Date, End_Date, Contract_Url, Status_Code, Remark, Create_Date) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{enterprise_No,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{product_No,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sub_Code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{start_Date,jdbcType=DATE}, #{end_Date,jdbcType=DATE}, #{contract_Url,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status_Code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{create_Date,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS Id

insert into cooperation_period (Id, Enterprise_No, Product_No, Sub_Code, Start_Date, End_Date, Contract_Url, Status_Code, Remark, Create_Date) values
(#{item.id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.enterprise_No,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.product_No,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.sub_Code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.start_Date,jdbcType=DATE}, #{item.end_Date,jdbcType=DATE}, #{item.contract_Url,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.status_Code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.create_Date,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into cooperation_period
Id,
Enterprise_No,
Product_No,
Sub_Code,
Start_Date,
End_Date,
Contract_Url,
Status_Code,
Remark,

mapper.update:
update cooperation_period
Id = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
Enterprise_No = #{record.enterprise_No,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Product_No = #{record.product_No,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Sub_Code = #{record.sub_Code,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Start_Date = #{record.start_Date,jdbcType=DATE},
End_Date = #{record.end_Date,jdbcType=DATE},
Contract_Url = #{record.contract_Url,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Status_Code = #{record.status_Code,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Create_Date = #{record.create_Date,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

update cooperation_period set Id = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, Enterprise_No = #{record.enterprise_No,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Product_No = #{record.product_No,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Sub_Code = #{record.sub_Code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Start_Date = #{record.start_Date,jdbcType=DATE}, End_Date = #{record.end_Date,jdbcType=DATE}, Contract_Url = #{record.contract_Url,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Status_Code = #{record.status_Code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Create_Date = #{record.create_Date,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}

update cooperation_period
Enterprise_No = #{enterprise_No,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Product_No = #{product_No,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Sub_Code = #{sub_Code,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Start_Date = #{start_Date,jdbcType=DATE},
End_Date = #{end_Date,jdbcType=DATE},
Contract_Url = #{contract_Url,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Status_Code = #{status_Code,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Create_Date = #{create_Date,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where Id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update cooperation_period set Enterprise_No = #{enterprise_No,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Product_No = #{product_No,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Sub_Code = #{sub_Code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Start_Date = #{start_Date,jdbcType=DATE}, End_Date = #{end_Date,jdbcType=DATE}, Contract_Url = #{contract_Url,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Status_Code = #{status_Code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Create_Date = #{create_Date,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where Id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
